description: Browser agent — navigates pages with Chromium and exposes task-level skills over HTTP A2A.

skills.name: Fetch Page Title
skills.description: Navigate to a URL with a real browser and return the contents of its <title> element.

skills.name: Extract Structured Data
skills.description: Navigate to a URL and extract data matching a natural-language description, returning JSON. Input the target URL and a description of what to extract.
